children.text: the creation of the basis for reconciliation between belligerents;
the promotion of economic development in areas of the countries of the South Caucasus and Central Asia impacted by civil conflict and war; and
the encouragement of broad regional cooperation among countries of the South Caucasus and Central Asia that have been destabilized by internal conflicts.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: To carry out the purposes of subsection (a), the President is authorized to provide humanitarian assistance and economic reconstruction assistance for the countries of the South Caucasus and Central Asia to support the activities described in subsection (c).

children.heading: Definition of humanitarian assistance
children.label: 2 Definition of humanitarian assistance
children.text: In this subsection, the term “humanitarian assistance” means assistance to meet humanitarian needs, including needs for food, medicine, medical supplies and equipment, education, and clothing.
providing for the humanitarian needs of victims of the conflicts;
facilitating the return of refugees and internally displaced persons to their homes; and
assisting in the reconstruction of residential and economic infrastructure destroyed by war.
